title: Availability
description: Availability of an item: whether it can be obtained, and a qualifying status.

available.description: Whether this can be obtained. See status for fulfillment details.

status.description: Qualifies available with fulfillment state. Well-known values: `in_stock`, `backorder`, `preorder`, `out_of_stock`, `discontinued`.

quantity.description: Current stock quantity. Business MAY omit if inventory tracking is not supported or if exact counts are confidential.

low_stock_threshold.description: Business-defined threshold below which the variant is considered low stock. When quantity is at or below this value, platforms SHOULD surface low-stock messaging to the buyer.

restock_at.description: Estimated restock date (RFC 3339). Business SHOULD provide when status is `out_of_stock` or `backorder` and a restock date is known.

available.description: Whether the variant is available at this location.

status.description: Location-level availability status. Same well-known values as variant-level status.

locations.description: Per-location availability for multi-location businesses. Enables agents to guide buyers to locations where the item is in stock.
